entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0117.10093] In the statement 1004 - Statement - Statements of Operations the concept us-gaap:RealizedInvestmentGainsLosses with a value of 529,886 and dimension of us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis and member of us-gaap:USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember is not equal to the dimensional breakdown of 527,717 using the dimension us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis and the second dimension us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis: USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember --> 4,672 --> us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember --> 27,351 --> us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesUltraYenMember USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember --> 3,035 --> us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesUltraShortBloombergNaturalGasMember, us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember --> 22,182 --> us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesVixMidTermFuturesEtfMember, us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember --> 6,395 --> us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember, us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesUltraShortGoldMember USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember --> 20,618 --> us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember, us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesUltraGoldMember
On the face financial statements it is expected that values reported are dimensionally complete for a given line item. If you added up the values of the dimensions the resulting sum should represent the actual aggregate value. This rule takes the dimensional values of an axis reported on the face financial statements and adds them up and compares them to the actual aggregate value reported anywhere in the filing. If they are different the rule reports an error.
The properties of this us-gaap:RealizedInvestmentGainsLosses fact are: Period :2021-01-01 to 2021-12-31 Unit : USD Dimensions : us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:USGovernmentAgenciesShorttermDebtSecuritiesMember Rule Element Id:10093 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - d899024d10ka.htm 55060

[DQC.US.0117.10093] In the statement 1004 - Statement - Statements of Operations the concept us-gaap:RealizedInvestmentGainsLosses with a value of 91,781,637 and dimension of us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis and member of us-gaap:FutureMember is not equal to the dimensional breakdown of 91,415,046 using the dimension us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis and the second dimension us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis: FutureMember --> 9,333,930 --> us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:FutureMember, us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesVixMidTermFuturesEtfMember FutureMember --> -11,586,506 --> us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesUltraSilverMember, us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:FutureMember FutureMember --> 1,858,730 --> us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:FutureMember, us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesUltraShortGoldMember FutureMember --> -35,674,319 --> us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesVixShortTermFuturesEtfMember, us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:FutureMember FutureMember --> 109,680,104 --> us-gaap:StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis=ck0001415311:ProsharesUltraBloombergCrudeOilMember, us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:FutureMember
On the face financial statements it is expected that values reported are dimensionally complete for a given line item. If you added up the values of the dimensions the resulting sum should represent the actual aggregate value. This rule takes the dimensional values of an axis reported on the face financial statements and adds them up and compares them to the actual aggregate value reported anywhere in the filing. If they are different the rule reports an error.
The properties of this us-gaap:RealizedInvestmentGainsLosses fact are: Period :2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31 Unit : USD Dimensions : us-gaap:FinancialInstrumentAxis=us-gaap:FutureMember Rule Element Id:10093 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - d899024d10ka.htm 55014
